title: Ordinary Modpack
description: Ordinary Modpack is a lightweight and beginner-friendly collection of essential mods, carefully selected to provide a smooth, stable, and enjoyable experience on the Ordinary SMP without unnecessary complexity.
body:
## An Ordinary Modpack Our **Ordinary Modpack** is a lightweight, beginner-friendly collection of essential mods designed for **[Ordinary SMP](https://discord.gg/GjmY3mECSX)**. We focus on **stability**, **performance**, and **ease of use**, providing a smooth and enjoyable Minecraft experience without unnecessary complexity. Our modpack is meant as a base for **you** to extend and add additional mods as **you** need, rather than being a full standalone modpack.
Included Mods - c2me – Improves chunk performance.
- No Chat Reports – Disables chat reporting.
- vmp – Uses Java time source instead of GLFW.
- GreeterBro – Greets players on join.
- Sodium – Boosts rendering performance.
- Mod Menu – Adds a mods list menu.
- WTHIT – Shows block and entity info.
- Sodium Extra – Adds extra Sodium features.
- Lithium – Optimizes game logic and AI.
- Armor Poser – Adds GUI for armor stands.
- Simple Voice Chat – Adds proximity voice chat.
- Peek – Previews shulker boxes and items.
- Required Libraries
